'''âg-f-l-f''' ('''kagaflefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunocamouflage|immunocamouflage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunocamouflage|immunocamouflage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-f-l-f
|-
! Lemma
| kagaflefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigaflefoko|thigaflefoko]] || [[word:jigaflefoko|jigaflefoko]] || [[word:shigaflefoko|shigaflefoko]] || [[word:kigaflefoko|kigaflefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugaflefoko|thuthugaflefoko]] || [[word:jujugaflefoko|jujugaflefoko]] || [[word:shushugaflefoko|shushugaflefoko]] || [[word:kukugaflefoko|kukugaflefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogaflefoko|thogaflefoko]] || [[word:jogaflefoko|jogaflefoko]] || [[word:shogaflefoko|shogaflefoko]] || [[word:kogaflefoko|kogaflefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagaflefoko|thagaflefoko]] || [[word:jagaflefoko|jagaflefoko]] || [[word:shagaflefoko|shagaflefoko]] || [[word:kagaflefoko|kagaflefoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
